summary: Iteration 70 - Supabase KPI Sync Service fully tested and working. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. All sync endpoints functional with real Supabase integration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supabase KPI sync service fully implemented and tested. Real Supabase integration working (not mocked). APScheduler runs hourly sync. Auto-sync triggers after KPI recalculation.

GET /api/sync/status.description: Returns correct structure with last_sync, status, mapping, synced_rows, clubs_synced

POST /api/sync/supabase (with X-Club-Id).description: Syncs KPIs for specified club to Supabase, returns {status: ok, rows_upserted: N}

POST /api/sync/supabase (unknown club_id.description: Returns {status: skipped, reason: 'No Supabase mapping for club...'}

POST /api/sync/supabase (no data club).description: Servette club (no KPI data) returns skipped status

POST /api/sync/supabase/all.description: Syncs all 4 mapped clubs, returns per-club results (2 ok, 2 skipped)

POST /api/sync/supabase (no header).description: Without X-Club-Id header, syncs all clubs like /supabase/all

GET /api/sync/status (after sync).description: Shows updated last_sync timestamp and status ok after sync

POST /api/monthly-kpis/{month}/recalcula.description: Triggers auto-sync to Supabase after KPI recalculation (verified in logs)

APScheduler hourly sync.description: Scheduler started at app startup, runs sync_all_clubs every hour (verified in logs)
